mapper.select:
select * from system_notice
and title like concat('%', #{title}, '%')
and status = #{status}
order by id desc
select * from system_notice where status = 1 order by publish_time desc, id desc
mapper.insert: insert into system_notice (title, content, type, status, publisher_id, publish_time, view_count) values (#{title}, #{content}, #{type}, #{status}, #{publisherId}, #{publishTime}, #{viewCount})
